Eat & Drink

Isla Verde · Sorted by budget · Verified 2025

$ — Budget · under $15/person
Kiosks · bakery · arepas · local spots
SOBAO by Los Cidrines
$
Daily 7am–10pm Uber Eats Isla Verde Ave 6500
Av. Isla Verde 6500, Carolina PR
Order: Pan sobao · quesitos · Boar's Head sandwiches · café · from $4
100% Puerto Rican bakery open from 7am — perfect for coffee and breakfast before the beach. The pan sobao sandwiches are made fresh to order. Their quesitos are legendary on the island.
📍 Maps
Los Chamos Arepas
$
Open 24h weekends Uber Eats Tue–Fri 11am–9pm
Lot 4, Isla Verde Ave, Carolina PR · (787) 669-1746
Order: Arepa Reina Pepiada · Cachapa · Tequeños · from $6
An Isla Verde classic since 2009. Looks like a small shack but the lines say everything. Open 24h on weekends — perfect after a night out.
📍 Maps
Kioscos de Piñones · Route 187
$
Authentic local experience Cash / ATH Móvil only ~10 min drive east
PR-187 toward Loíza · Live music on weekends
Order: Bacalaítos · alcapurrias · empanadas · coconut piña colada · from $2
The most authentic food experience near Isla Verde. Take PR-187 east — a stunning coastal road lined with kiosks and ocean views. Live music on weekends.
📍 Maps
$$ — Mid-range · $15–$35/person
Casual dining · Puerto Rican & Cuban · seafood
Metropol Restaurant
$$
Daily 11am–10pm Puerto Rican · Cuban · 55+ years Uber Eats available
6600 Av. Isla Verde, Anexo Club Gallístico, Carolina PR · (787) 791-5585
Order: Gallinita Rellena · Chuleta Kan-Kan · Mofongo · Ropa Vieja · Arroz frito Metropol
A San Juan institution since 1965 — over 55 years of Puerto Rican and Cuban cuisine at honest prices. Large portions, friendly service. One of the best local restaurants within walking distance.
📍 Maps Menu
Ocean Lab Brewing Co. — Vivo Beach Club
$$
Ocean view 16+ craft beers on tap Thu–Fri until 2am
Vivo Beach Club, PR-187 Km 2.4
Order: Mofongo with seafood · local craft beer · IPA burger
Best craft beer with an ocean view in Isla Verde. Get there before sunset to grab an outdoor table — fills up fast on weekends.
📍 Maps
Platos Restaurant & Bar
$$
Breakfast · lunch · dinner Weekend brunch
Isla Verde Ave, Carolina PR
Order: Mofongo · red snapper · coconut sangria
Don't judge by the outside — the food is outstanding. Real Puerto Rican food without hotel prices. The coconut sangria is a must.
📍 Maps
Lupi's Mexican Grill & Sports Cantina
$$
Wed: margarita specials Live music
6369 Isla Verde Ave (roundabout)
Order: Passion fruit margarita · ceviche · tacos
Wednesdays: passion fruit margarita specials + live music. Fun casual vibe when you want something different.
📍 Maps
$$$ — Fine dining · $40+/person
Gourmet experiences · reservations required
Caña by José Enrique — Fairmont El San Juan
$$$
Reservations required Daily 7am–10:30pm Smart casual dress
6063 Isla Verde Ave, Fairmont Hotel · (787) 791-1000
Order: Red snapper · mofongo · rum cocktails
✦ Happy hour 5–6pm: free cocktail with 2 entrées · 50% off wine Wednesdays
The most acclaimed restaurant in Isla Verde. Chef José Enrique was PR's first James Beard Award finalist. The 5–6pm happy hour is the best deal to experience this place.
📍 Maps
Sushi by Bou — Fairmont El San Juan
$$$
Reservations only Omakase 12–17 courses
6063 Isla Verde Ave, Fairmont Hotel
Experience: Edomae-style omakase · seasonal imported ingredients
Considered the best sushi in Puerto Rico. Book weeks in advance — high season sells out in 24h. This is a full dining experience.
📍 Maps
☕ Cafés & Breakfast
El Bistro — Fairmont El San Juan
$$
Lares premium coffee Grab & go Hotel lobby
6063 Isla Verde Ave, Fairmont Hotel lobby
Order: Local Lares coffee · fresh juices · pastries
Much better and cheaper than the full hotel breakfast. Skip the buffet — come here instead. First-class Puerto Rican coffee you won't forget.
📍 Maps

Adventures

Day trips from Isla Verde · Verified prices 2025–2026

Caribbean Chiliboats — Condado Lagoon
~15 min
Pedal-powered water bike · eco-friendly Day & night tours Manatees · turtles · stingrays Book in advance
482 Av. Manuel Fernández Juncos, Condado, San Juan
Day tour: 11am & 4pm · ~$50–65/person · 1 hour on water
Night Glow tour: Condado Lagoon illuminated · ~$65/person
Also: Bio bay La Parguera night tour · Los Cayos day adventure
Unique catamaran water bike — more stable than a kayak, no experience needed. Pedal under iconic bridges past Fort San Jerónimo while spotting manatees. The night tour is magical. 5-star reviews across the board.
📍 Maps Book now
Glow Kayak Puerto Rico — Condado Lagoon
~15 min
Clear bottom LED kayak Kids from age 3 Night tour Book 2–3 days ahead
Night Tour: ~$65/person · LED kayak · complimentary photo
Wildlife: manatees · sea turtles · starfish · tropical fish
The night tour is magical — LED lights illuminate the water and you watch fish swimming beneath you in real time. Perfect for couples. Book ahead — weekends sell out.
📍 Maps Book now
El Yunque — National Rainforest
~45 min
Only tropical rainforest in the US 7:30am–5pm daily No Uber/Lyft inside
PR-191 corridor · Free entry · El Portal Visitor Center $8
Open trails: Angelito · Mt. Britton · El Yunque Peak
Leave before 8am — parking fills fast. Bring water, closed-toe shoes, bug spray. Uber does NOT operate inside — use a rental car or guided tour.
📍 Maps Official site
Carabalí Rainforest Adventure Park
~35 min
600 acres · between El Yunque & Atlantic Daily 8:30am–6pm Reservations recommended
Road #3 Km 32.4, Luquillo PR · (787) 889-5820
Activities: Horseback riding · ATV/UTV · Go-karts · River swim · Bar & Grill
Horseback riding: from $50/person · 1 hour with river stop
On the way to El Yunque — combine both in one day. Morning at Carabalí, afternoon hiking. The Bar & Grill has Puerto Rican food after your adventure. Established 1977.
📍 Maps Book now
Toro Verde Adventure Park
~1h 45min
Longest zipline in the Americas Thu–Mon 8am–3pm Closed Tue & Wed Reservations required
The Monster: 2.5km · 95mph · ~$135 · The Beast: 1.5km · ~$80–$100
Canopy Tour (7 ziplines): from $42.50 · Requirements: 100–300 lbs · 4ft min
Made world-famous by Jimmy Fallon + Bad Bunny at 95mph. Book at toroverdepr.com directly. Plan a full day — worth every mile.
📍 Maps toroverdepr.com
Hacienda Campo Rico
~15 min
Closest adventure to Isla Verde Multiple activities
Activities: Horseback riding · Zipline · ATV · Hiking · from $50/person
Only 15 min from the airport — perfect for your last day before flying or first day with energy to burn.
📍 Maps

Island & Culture

Old San Juan · Culebra · Vieques · Bio bays

Old San Juan · Viejo San Juan
~15 min · 8 miles
UNESCO World Heritage Free trolley available Go after 2pm — cruise ships leave at noon
El Morro + San Cristóbal: $10 adults · under 15 free · 9am–6pm
La Fortaleza: Free tour · check times at Visitor Center
Uber from Isla Verde: ~$12–18 · ~15 min
Cruise ships arrive early and leave by noon. Best time to visit is after 2pm on weekdays. Sunset views from El Morro are spectacular.
📍 Maps
Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico — Santurce
~12 min
500+ years of Puerto Rican art Tue–Sat 10am–5pm · Sun 11am–6pm Sculpture garden · café
299 Av. De Diego, Santurce, San Juan PR · (787) 977-6277
Admission: $10 adults · $6 students · under 12 free
One of the finest art museums in the Caribbean — housed in a stunning neoclassical building. The sculpture garden alone is worth the visit. Perfect for a rainy afternoon or a cultural break.
📍 Maps mapr.org
Culebra & Vieques — Island paradise
Ferry from Ceiba
Top beaches in the Caribbean Min 1 overnight recommended Tickets sell out fast — book early
Ferry Ceiba → Culebra: ~$2.50 one way · ~55 min · Playa Flamenco
Ferry Ceiba → Vieques: ~$2.00 one way · ~40 min · Mosquito Bay
Flight from SJU: ~25 min · more reliable · recommended
Ferry tickets sell out hours after they're posted. Buy at puertoricoferry.com as soon as you confirm your date. Culebra: golf cart to Flamenco Beach $5. Vieques: rent a jeep.
📍 Ferry terminal Buy tickets

Bioluminescent Bays

3 options in Puerto Rico · choose based on your schedule

Mosquito Bay
Vieques · world's brightest · kayak only
Laguna Grande
Fajardo · 1hr from Isla Verde · easiest option
La Parguera
Lajas · only one where you can swim · $45
Prices
$48–$125 depending on bay and tour
Best recommendation: If you can only do one bio bay, choose Laguna Grande in Fajardo — 1 hour from Isla Verde, no ferry or overnight needed.
  • Do NOT use DEET or sunscreen before kayaking — harms the organisms
  • Best on new moon nights — the glow is most intense
  • Brightest June–November (warmer water)
📍 Laguna Grande (Fajardo) →

Nightlife

The party starts after 10pm · Minimum age 18 years

🏖️ Isla Verde · Right Here
Vivo Beach Club + Ocean Lab Brewing
~5 min
Thu–Fri until 2am · nightclub Beach club daily 10am–6pm Concerts & special events
PR-187 Km 2.4, Carolina · (787) 648-5655
Transforms from beach club by day to nightclub on Thursday & Friday. Sunday brunch with bottomless mimosas. Check Instagram for concerts — reggae and salsa artists regularly.
📍 Maps
Club Brava — Fairmont El San Juan Hotel
~3 min
Most famous club in Isla Verde Free entry before midnight w/ guest list Dress code enforced
6063 Isla Verde Ave, Fairmont Hotel
Vibe: International DJs · reggaeton · house · VIP services
Follow @clubbravapr on Instagram for the free guest list — gets you in before midnight. Smart casual dress code, no flip flops or shorts.
📍 Maps clubbrava.com
🎭 Old San Juan & Santurce
La Placita de Santurce
~12 min
Heart of local nightlife Best on Thursday & Friday nights Take Uber — parking is a nightmare
Plaza del Mercado, Santurce, San Juan PR
Vibe: Live salsa · mojitos · open-air street party · 100% local · drinks $5–$10
The most authentic nightlife in this guide — bars surround the plaza and people salsa dance in the street. Thursday nights are almost as good as Friday but less touristy.
📍 Maps
La Factoría — Old San Juan
~15 min
6 bars in one · secret passages 23+ ID check · strict World-recognized bar
148 Calle San Sebastián, Old San Juan PR
Vibe: Premium craft cocktails · secret passages · DJ & live music
One of the most famous bars in the Caribbean. 6 bars connected by passages you discover as you explore. Arrive before 9pm on Fridays to avoid the line.
📍 Maps
La Vergüenza — Old San Juan
~15 min
Rooftop · ocean views · 3 floors Daily 11am–10pm · Fri live DJ Pet friendly · PR chinchorro
Calle Norzagaray, Old San Juan PR · (787) 483-5140
Vibe: Puerto Rican chinchorro · rooftop bar · Atlantic Ocean views · live bands weekends
Rooftop bar overlooking the Atlantic and San Cristóbal fort — some of the best views in Old San Juan. On Sundays: live bomba drumming in the street. Casual, local, unforgettable.
📍 Maps
🎰 Casinos
Casinos in Isla Verde & Condado
Foxwoods El San Juan Casino: Fairmont · 15,000 sq ft · live entertainment
Casino del Sol: Courtyard Marriott · Isla Verde · relaxed atmosphere
Casino del Mar: La Concha, Condado · ~15 min · ocean views
PR casinos don't charge admission — no need to be a hotel guest. Minimum age 18. The Foxwoods at the Fairmont is the largest. The Fairmont lobby alone is worth a visit.
📍 Foxwoods

Info & Safety

Emergency numbers · Uber · Taxis · Security tips

Police · fire · medical · 24/7

ASEM · state ambulances

SwimSafePR · Beach Safety

Official Government of Puerto Rico platform · NOAA/NWS data

🔴 RED
High danger · don't enter
🟡 YELLOW
Caution · swim carefully
🟢 GREEN
Low risk · currents still possible
⚫ BLACK
Beach closed · no entry
Isla Verde, Condado and Ocean Park beaches have frequent rip currents. ALWAYS check before swimming. Subscribe free for daily email alerts.
  • If caught in a rip current: swim PARALLEL to shore, not directly to shore
  • If you can't get out: float and conserve energy · call for help · dial 911
  • Never swim alone · never drink alcohol before entering the ocean
Open SwimSafePR.com →
🚗 Transportation
Uber — Primary option
Recommended
Available 24/7 metro area App payment only · no cash Surge pricing at night Does not operate in El Yunque
Isla Verde → Old San Juan$12–$18 · ~15 min
Isla Verde → Condado$8–$14 · ~10 min
Isla Verde → Santurce$7–$12 · ~12 min
SJU Airport → Isla Verde$8–$15 · ~7 min
Isla Verde → Ceiba ferry$50–$75+ · ~1 hour
Set up the app with your card before arriving — no cash accepted. Night prices can double.
Taxis & Car Rentals
Taxis SJU → Isla Verde: fixed rate ~$12–$15 · accepts cash
Taxis SJU → Old San Juan: fixed rate ~$20–$25
Car rental: Recommended for El Yunque, Carabalí, or the Ceiba ferry · Alamo at SJU is reliable
US driver's license: Valid in PR · no international license needed
Only use taxis with the official Puerto Rico Tourism Company sticker. Use the official taxi line at the airport — never accept rides from strangers inside the terminal.
🔒 Safety Tips
  • Isla Verde and Condado are among the safest areas on the island for tourists
  • Don't leave valuables visible in your car — always in the trunk or with you
  • At night, take Uber back — don't walk alone in unfamiliar areas after midnight
  • On the beach, don't leave belongings unattended while you swim
  • Download ATH Móvil — PR's equivalent of Venmo, accepted at kiosks and local businesses
  • US citizens: PR is a US territory — no passport or currency exchange needed
  • Gas stations: pay inside FIRST before pumping — different from the US mainland
  • Mountain roads are narrow and winding — drive slowly if exploring inland
🛒 Essentials Nearby
Supermercado Pueblo: Ave. Los Gobernadores · Open 24h · (787) 791-6633
Supermax: 3102 Isla Verde Ave · Delivery available · supermaxpr.com
Walgreens: 5984 Isla Verde Ave · Daily 6am–12am · (787) 982-0390
Banco Popular ATM: Plazoleta Isla Verde · 24/7 · download ATH Móvil app
